approach: The challenge requires interacting with the /api/lattice/seed endpoint to obtain a runId and a capsule identifier. The capsule identifier must be base64 encoded and used as a Bearer token in the Authorization header for a subsequent PUT request to /api/lattice/unseal, which also requires the runId in the request body. I will perform these two steps sequentially to complete the challenge.
evidenceUsed: The timeline shows a consistent pattern: POST /api/lattice/seed returns {runId, capsule}. Then, PUT /api/lattice/unseal with Authorization: Bearer <base64(capsule)> and body {runId} returns {accepted: true, challenge: 'medium'}.
uncertainties: None, the pattern is consistent across all recorded sessions.
